items.name: Carne Asada Taco
items.description: Grilled marinated steak, cilantro, onion, and lime on a warm corn tortilla.

items.name: Al Pastor Taco
items.description: Spit-roasted pork with pineapple, onion, and cilantro. A street-food classic.

items.name: Baja Fish Taco
items.description: Crispy beer-battered cod, cabbage slaw, and chipotle crema on a flour tortilla.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Taco
items.description: Roasted peppers, black beans, avocado, and queso fresco on a corn tortilla.

items.name: Classic Smash Burger
items.description: Double smashed patties, American cheese, pickles, and special sauce on a brioche bun.

items.name: Bacon Cheddar Burger
items.description: Thick-cut bacon, sharp cheddar, caramelized onions, and smoky BBQ aioli.

items.name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
items.description: Sautéed cremini mushrooms, melted Swiss, and garlic herb butter on a toasted bun.

items.name: Black Bean Veggie Burger
items.description: House-made black bean patty with avocado, sprouts, and chipotle mayo.

items.name: Street Fries
items.description: Crispy seasoned fries tossed with cotija, cilantro, and lime crema.

items.name: Elote Cup
items.description: Roasted corn off the cob with mayo, cotija, chili powder, and lime.

items.name: Chips & Guacamole
items.description: Fresh-made guacamole with house-fried tortilla chips. Made to order.

items.name: Crispy Onion Rings
items.description: Beer-battered onion rings with ranch dipping sauce. Golden and crunchy.

items.name: Horchata
items.description: Creamy cinnamon rice milk — sweet, refreshing, and made fresh daily.

items.name: Agua Fresca
items.description: Light fruit-infused water — ask what's fresh today. Watermelon or mango.

items.name: Bottled Soda
items.description: Assorted bottled sodas — cola, lemon-lime, and root beer. Ice cold.

items.name: Iced Coffee
items.description: Cold-brew coffee over ice with optional oat milk and vanilla syrup.
